;<span id="Memorized_element">memorized element</span>
:[[Glossary:Element|element]] that takes part in the learning process (i.e. is repeated in [[Glossary:Interval|intervals]] suggested by [[Glossary:SuperMemo|SuperMemo]]). A '''memorized element''' can be made a [[Glossary:Pending_element|pending element]] with [[Glossary:Forget|'''Forget''']] (e.g. '''[[Element menu#Learning|Learning]] : Forget''' in the [[element menu]]). It can also be made a [[Glossary:Dismissed_element|dismissed element]] with [[Glossary:Dismiss|'''Dismiss''']] (e.g. '''[[Element menu#Learning|Learning]] : Dimiss''' (''Ctrl+D'') from the [[element menu]]).
